//: NYSDS compliance gate for CSS. declaration-strict-value (NYSDS tokens) is the point and stays strict. selector-class-pattern is tuned to allow the project's BEM convention (used by the NYSDS reference components).

scale-unlimited/declaration-strict-value.message: Use a --nys-* design token (e.g. var(--nys-color-text) / var(--nys-space-150)) instead of a hardcoded value.
